title: cuphea hybogyna
intro: Cuphea hygrophana, also known as the Mexican heather or Mexican plume poppy, is a flowering plant species native to Mexico. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Cuphea hygrophana include reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. The plant can be used to make herbal preparations such as teas and infusions, which are often used to soothe skin irritations and promote overall well-being.
